touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to Sofia Levy at OrbitAI regarding pipeline visibility challenges. No response received.
Follow-up cold email to Sofia. She responded expressing interest in learning more about our platform's pipeline visibility capabilities.

questions_asked.question: What makes your solution different from other revenue intelligence platforms?
questions_asked.answer: Our AI-driven approach provides real-time pipeline visibility with predictive deal scoring, automated activity capture, and conversation intelligence that helps CS and sales teams identify risk early.

next_steps: Schedule brief intro call to discuss OrbitAI's current challenges

touches.ai_summary: Qualification email exchange. Sofia confirmed they're evaluating solutions to improve forecast accuracy and pipeline management across their customer success team.

questions_asked.question: What tools are you currently using for pipeline visibility?
questions_asked.answer: We're using Salesforce but it's mostly manual updates. We've also looked at Gong but haven't committed yet.

touches.ai_summary: Sofia provided more context on team size (32 people need access) and confirmed her COO Tariq would need to be involved for final approval. Also mentioned IT Director Asher will evaluate technical requirements.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Tariq our COO will make the final call, and Asher from IT needs to review integrations. Aria from our implementation team should also be looped in as an end user.

touches.ai_summary: Pre-discovery email confirming agenda and participants. Sofia confirmed she'll join solo first to discuss pain points before bringing in broader team.
Brief discovery call with Sofia. She outlined challenges with forecast accuracy and manual CRM updates. Mentioned they're in early conversations with Gong but concerned about complexity and cost.

questions_asked.question: What's your biggest pain point with pipeline visibility today?
questions_asked.answer: Our forecasts are consistently off by 20-30% because reps don't log activities consistently. We need something that captures everything automatically.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation tier work compared to per-seat pricing?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation tier gives you all AI features without usage limits, unlike competitors who charge per conversation or recording.

next_steps: Schedule full demo with Sofia and key stakeholders

touches.ai_summary: Full product demo with Sofia. Originally scheduled earlier but was rescheduled. Walked through automated activity capture, deal scoring, and pipeline analytics. Sofia engaged positively but mentioned they're also demoing Gong next week.

questions_asked.question: Can you show how the deal scoring algorithm works?
questions_asked.answer: Demonstrated XGBoost-based scoring using engagement signals, timeline patterns, and stakeholder involvement to predict deal health.

questions_asked.question: How does this integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Native bi-directional sync - all activities, insights, and scores flow automatically into Salesforce without manual intervention.

questions_asked.question: What resonated most from what you saw today?
questions_asked.answer: The automated capture is huge for us. We waste so much time on CRM hygiene. The predictive scoring would also help us focus on the right deals.

objections: We need to see how this compares to Gong before making a decision

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Sofia, originally scheduled for earlier but rescheduled. Discussed pricing for 32 seats at $23k ACV with unlimited automation tier. Sofia expressed concern about budget and asked for flexibility on pricing.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the annual commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We can structure this as a 12-month agreement with quarterly business reviews to ensure you're getting value.

questions_asked.question: How does this compare price-wise to what Gong quoted you?
questions_asked.answer: Asked Sofia to share their requirements so we can ensure we're comparing apples to apples on features and user count.

objections: The pricing is higher than we initially budgeted for this initiative
next_steps: Schedule call with Tariq to discuss business case

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Sofia. Discussed revised pricing with 26% discount to fit budget constraints. Sofia appreciates the flexibility but needs to get Tariq's approval before proceeding. She mentioned Gong is still in the running.

questions_asked.question: What's included in your onboarding and support?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated implementation manager, 30-day onboarding program, ongoing CSM support, and unlimited training for your team.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a clear yes for you and Tariq?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly, the pricing adjustment helps a lot. We need to validate that the ROI justifies this over Gong, and Tariq will want to see proof it works for a team our size.

questions_asked.question: When do you need to make a final decision?
questions_asked.answer: We're hoping to have something in place by end of quarter, so within the next few weeks ideally.

objections: Still comparing against Gong's feature set and pricing
next_steps: Schedule executive alignment call with Tariq
Provide customer references in PropTech space

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with COO Tariq Abiola and Sofia. Tariq asked pointed questions about ROI, implementation timeline, and differentiation from Gong. He was engaged but analytical, wanting to ensure this drives measurable forecast accuracy improvement.

questions_asked.question: What kind of forecast accuracy improvement have similar companies seen?
questions_asked.answer: Shared case study showing PropTech customer improved forecast accuracy from 68% to 89% within 90 days of deployment.

questions_asked.question: How long until we see value from this investment?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see initial insights within 2 weeks of deployment, measurable forecast improvement by end of quarter one.

questions_asked.question: Why should we choose you over Gong?
questions_asked.answer: Our focus is actionable pipeline intelligence vs. just conversation recording. Our predictive scoring and automated workflow triggers help teams act on insights, not just review them.

questions_asked.question: What concerns do you still have?
questions_asked.answer: I need to make sure our IT team can implement this smoothly and that your support is responsive. Sofia will coordinate with Asher on technical review.

objections: We need IT sign-off on integrations and security before I can approve this
next_steps: Target decision by end of next week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Sofia post-exec meeting. Sent technical documentation and security materials for Asher's review. Sofia confirmed they're moving forward with internal review and will have a decision soon.

questions_asked.question: Can you connect directly with Asher to answer his technical questions?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, I'll reach out to Asher today to schedule a technical deep-dive and answer any integration or security questions.

next_steps: Technical review call with Asher scheduled
